title: The Crocodile Who Forgot How to Croc
premise_summary: crocodile fails at basic croc things
cover_description: A crocodile sitting cross-legged with a tiny mouse patting his head sympathetically while he stares sadly at his own tail
script:
[TITLE: The Crocodile Who Forgot How to Croc]
[AGE: 6-8]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon, comedic_villain]
[COMEDY_TYPE: sarcastic_commentary]

[SETUP]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: curious, gentle] Why do you always snap your jaws like that, Mr. Croc? [STING: mouse_squeak]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, bluster] Because I am a *fearsome* crocodile, little rodent! [STING: villain_dramatic]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: tentative] Oh. So... that’s just what crocs *do*? [STING: tiptoe]

[BEAT_1]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: triumphant] Exactly! Watch this—*snap!* [STING: medium_hit]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious] That was your tail. [STING: sweet_pause]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: dismissive] ...Hmph. I *meant* to do that. [STING: deflation]

[BEAT_2]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: bluster] Observe my *terrifying* technique—*snap!* [STING: big_crash]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: pointed] That was a leaf. [STING: slide_whistle]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: scrambling] ...I was *practicing*! [STING: villain_fail]

[BEAT_3]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] FINE! I’ll show you *real* snapping—*snap!* [STING: splat]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: calm gotcha, quiet] That was your own nose. [STING: silence]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: stunned] ...I think I forgot how to croc. [STING: deflation]

[BUTTON]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: devastating, deadpan] [PUNCHLINE]Maybe you’re just a lizard with a confidence problem.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: sweet_eyeroll]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: deflated, wistful] ...Can I be a rock instead? [STING: whoosh]

[COVER: A crocodile sitting cross-legged with a tiny mouse patting his head sympathetically while he stares sadly at his own tail]
[PREMISE: crocodile fails at basic croc things]
